name: Godiva Brownies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Godiva Liqueur Drink and Dessert Collection
1. Melt chocolate and butter in a double boiler. When smooth, add instant coffee and set aside to cool.
2. Beat eggs and salt together until slightly fluffy. Gradually add sugar and beat until the mixture is ribbony (about 10 minutes).
3. Add vanilla, Godiva liqueur, and cooled chocolate mixture to the egg mixture while beating on low speed.
4. Fold in sifted flour until just incorporated.
5. Gently fold in chopped walnuts.
6. Pour batter into a greased, floured, and parchment-lined baking pan measuring 11 inches by 17 inches.
7. Place the pan in a preheated oven set to 450 degrees Fahrenheit. Lower the temperature to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Bake for 20-22 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Yield: Twenty 3-inch by 3-inch brownies.
